title: Notification SO 4405 dated 5 Dec 2019 regarding Privileges and Immunities to Regional Office of the International Committee of the Red Cross and its officers
description: Notification SO 4405 dated 5 Dec 2019 regarding Privileges and Immunities to Regional Office of the International Committee of the Red Cross and its officers
text: 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDI ARY [PART ll-SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th December, 2019 S.O. 4405(E).-Whereas in pursance of the exchange of letters between the Government of India and the International Committee of the Red Cross, India, it is decided to accord the Regional Office of International Committe of Red Cross, privileges and irnmunities in India similar to those contained in sections 7(b), 8 and 18 of the Schedule to the United Nations (Privileges and Immunities), Act 1947 (46 of 1947) for a further period of two years from Ist January, 2020. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 3 of the aforementioned Act, the Central Government hereby notifies that the privileges and immunities extended to the Regional Office of the International Committee of the Red Cross in India vide its Notification No. D-II/451/16(2)/85 dated the 16th June, 1986 shall apply, mutatis mutandis to the Regional Office of the International Committee of the Red Cross in India and to its officers for a period of2 years from Olst January, 2020. This notification shall remain in force for a period of two years years from Olst January, 2020. [F. No. D-III4SI/l6(3)/2010] NAGESH SINGH, Jt. Secy.
